## What does this PR do?

<!-- 1-2 sentence summary. What changes, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🏗️ Refactor (no functional change, just code clean-up)
- [ ] 🧪 Test / CI improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the [coding style](../CONTRIBUTING.md#coding-style)
- [ ] I tested locally — `pio run` succeeds
- [ ] For UI changes : tested on Chrome AND Safari/Firefox
- [ ] For UI changes : added translations to both `translations.fr` and `translations.en`
- [ ] For firmware changes : tested on real hardware (state which board)
- [ ] I updated documentation if behaviour changed
- [ ] I added/updated CHANGELOG.md if user-visible

## Tested on

- ESP32 board : (e.g. ESP32-WROOM-32, Keyestudio Plus)
- Firmware build : flash usage from PIO output
- Browser (UI) : Chrome / Safari / Firefox
- OS : macOS / Windows / Linux
